moments.title: Carly Simon born
moments.blurb: Carly Simon, known for her hit song You're So Vain, was born on June 22, 1945

angles.name: 70s icon
angles.copy: Carly Simon, the voice behind You're So Vain, was born on this day in 1945

angles.name: songwriting legend
angles.copy: Born on this day in 1945, Carly Simon is a songwriting legend with a career spanning decades

angles.name: vain but talented
angles.copy: You're So Vain singer Carly Simon celebrates her birthday today, but we won't tell you what she's vain about

moments.title: Wimbledon 2026
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships begin on June 29, 2026, and will run for two weeks

angles.name: grass court action
angles.copy: Get ready for two weeks of thrilling grass-court tennis as Wimbledon 2026 begins on June 29

angles.name: tennis fever
angles.copy: The wait is almost over: Wimbledon 2026 starts on June 29, and we can't wait to see the action unfold

angles.name: SW19 here we come
angles.copy: The All England Lawn Tennis Club in SW19 is gearing up for Wimbledon 2026, starting June 29

moments.title: British Grand Prix
moments.blurb: The British Grand Prix takes place at Silverstone on July 5, 2026, as part of the F1 season

angles.name: f1 at silverstone
angles.copy: The British Grand Prix is just around the corner, taking place at Silverstone on July 5, 2026

angles.name: racing action
angles.copy: Get ready for high-speed action as the British Grand Prix comes to Silverstone on July 5, 2026

angles.name: silverstone awaits
angles.copy: The British Grand Prix, round 12 of the 2026 F1 season, takes place at Silverstone on July 5

moments.title: Summer Solstice
moments.blurb: The summer solstice typically falls on June 20 or 21 in the Northern Hemisphere, marking the longest day of the year

angles.name: longest day
angles.copy: The summer solstice has passed, but the long days of summer are here to stay for a while

angles.name: season of sunshine
angles.copy: Summer is officially here, and we're looking forward to warm days and sunny skies

angles.name: make the most of it
angles.copy: The summer solstice has marked the beginning of the season, so let's make the most of the long days and warm nights

moments.title: George Harrison born
moments.blurb: George Harrison, the quiet Beatle, was born on February 25, 1943, but another famous musician was born on June 23, however, one famous musician was born on June 22 and another on June 25 - George is not the only musician with a birthday in this period -  Chris Wood of Traffic was born on June 24, 1944

angles.name: traffic legend
angles.copy: Chris Wood, the legendary saxophonist and flautist of Traffic, was born on June 24, 1944

angles.name: wood you believe
angles.copy: Born on June 24, 1944, Chris Wood was a talented musician who played with Traffic and other notable bands

angles.name: remembering chris
angles.copy: We're remembering the talented Chris Wood, born on June 24, 1944, who left his mark on the music world with Traffic
